title: Voronezh、Voronezh Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Voronezh、Voronezh Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Voronezh是Voronezh Oblast的一个城市，人口约1,050,000。A historic city in the Black Earth region, a major industrial and cultural center with a well-preserved 18th-century center.
